configure.note: For LOCAL installations, EchoBird handles model configuration automatically via the App Manager UI (MODIFY ONLY button). The steps below are for REMOTE server deployments where there is no UI.
configure.schema_rules: OpenClaw v2026.3.11+: provider fields are baseUrl/apiKey/api/models[] only — NO auth or authHeader. Model object requires input:["text"] and reasoning:false.

A_openai_compatible.description: User has an OpenAI-compatible API key (most common)

B_anthropic_compatible.description: User has an Anthropic-compatible API (same script as A, change api field)

C_local_llm_server.description: Use EchoBird LLM Server already running on this remote server (port 8090)

configure.after_configure: Always restart the gateway after writing config: pkill -f 'openclaw gateway' || true && sleep 1 && export PATH="$HOME/.npm-global/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && nohup openclaw gateway --allow-unconfigured > /tmp/openclaw.log 2>&1 &
